description: Analyze the block stability considering an “isolated rigid body.” The free-face keyword is used to specify the face group name for the free faces of the block (faces to which the boundary stress relaxation will be applied).

keywords.name: block-extra
keywords.description: Specify the extra variable slot to store mean block factor of safety. The mean block FOS is calculated from the face FOS values. If the block-extra keyword is not given, mean block FOS is not stored with the blocks (but is still printed to the screen).

keywords.name: cohesion
keywords.description: Specify the cohesion for block faces. If not defined, the property is derived from the contact properties.

keywords.name: free-face
keywords.description: Specify the face group name for the free faces of the block.

keywords.name: friction
keywords.description: Specify the joint friction for block faces. If not defined, the property is derived from the contact properties.

keywords.name: stiffness-normal
keywords.description: Specify the normal stiffness for block faces. If not defined, the property is derived from the contact properties.

keywords.name: stiffness-shear
keywords.description: Specify the shear stiffness for block faces. If not defined, the property is derived from the contact properties.
